author: doll-agent
content:
Replace inverse-CDF binary-search sampler in weighted_sample_with_replacement with Vose's alias method. Setup is O(n); each sample becomes O(1) (one uniform integer + one uniform float, no binary search). Reference: M. D. Vose, IEEE TSE 17(9), 1991.

Tests added: alias distribution recovers expected frequencies on uneven probability vectors (100k samples within 1.5% of target); unnormalized probs handled cleanly through the internal scaling pass.
